title: ROG Ally buttons for legacy 4j
description: ROG Ally buttons that look nice
body:
1/27/26: i shouldve made it replace the steam deck buttons instead..
idk what i was thinking when making this lmao but il try to work on this again cause the RB & B, icons are sort of unreadable
